recommendations: Rewrite the flagged long sentences below using the suggested replacements.

sentence_rewrites.current: Homepage hero intro block is broad and hard to scan.
sentence_rewrites.suggested: Use a 2-3 sentence hero: who you help, what users can do here, and where to start. Example: "Learn practical ethical hacking with step-by-step guides. Start with Wi-Fi security, Active Directory, or malware analysis using the tracks below."

sentence_rewrites.current: Section descriptions mix too many topics in one long paragraph.
sentence_rewrites.suggested: Replace with short blurbs per section (1 sentence each) and add a clear CTA link: "Start Wi-Fi Security", "Explore AD Attack Paths", "View Red-Team Cheat Sheets".

paragraphs: I design cinematic web experiences and build autonomous AI systems that turn product ideas into working software.
Based in Karachi, Sindh, Pakistan . Building production web apps, AI agents, and polished product interfaces.

I am a Full Stack Web Developer and Agentic AI Developer based in Karachi, Pakistan. I build high-performance web applications using Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Sanity CMS, and I design intelligent AI systems powered by OpenAI Agent SDK, CrewAI, LangChain, and FastAPI. From crafting pixel-perfect interfaces to architecting multi-agent AI pipelines, I work across the full spectrum of modern product development. As the founder of CodePulse Innovations, I turned that vision into reality by building FolioGenerator.com, an AI-driven platform that generates professional portfolio websites from resumes instantly.
From autonomous AI agents to cinematic frontends, these projects represent my obsession with performance, intelligence, and high-end design.
Cutting-edge creative marketing agency platform specializing in web design, branding, and SEO solutions.
Always-on AI guardian assistant for Windows using voice and face recognition, and continuous system monitoring.

Autonomous, end-to-end AI system that identifies businesses with weak online presence, scores their opportunity value, and generates hyper-personalized cold outreach emails — with a real-time Next.js dashboard and one-click email delivery via Resend.
Collaborative household finance tracker with real-time expense syncing, transaction categorization, and multi-member household management — built on Supabase with Row Level Security.
A local-first, file-based AI assistant powered by Claude Code CLI, Obsidian, and Gmail polling.
Culturally-rooted, multi-agent AI tutoring platform for Pakistani students in Hinglish with board-specific syllabus.
Secure, anonymous, and PWA-ready file-sharing application with a minimalist hacker-themed interface.
AI-powered book built with Docusaurus, Qdrant vector search, and Google Gen-AI. Developed using Spec-Driven Development.
Practical notes on agentic systems, AI product workflows, and the engineering choices behind modern full-stack AI apps.
Learn how to bridge Next.js with Asentum's Euler upgrade to build robust decentralized agentic AI workflows. This guide covers integration steps and architecture for the new Operator app.
Learn how to integrate the Nokia NSP agentic AI framework for real-time network visualization. Build robust monitoring dashboards using Next.js and secure data practices.
Learn how to protect your applications using the Akamai agentic security framework. We cover practical implementation steps for securing agentic AI traffic in Next.js.
Have an AI product, agent workflow, or cinematic web experience in mind? Send the basics and I will reply with the next practical step.

seo_issues.finding: Content may be thin for a blog post (550 words).
seo_issues.fix: Aim for 1,500+ words of substantive, unique content.
Add a visible author byline with credentials. Critical post-Dec 2025 E-E-A-T update.

environment_fixes.title: 1 security headers missing
environment_fixes.reason: Missing headers reduce trust and can expose the site to browser/security risks.
environment_fixes.fix: Set security headers in `next.config.js` `headers()` or at your edge/CDN.

environment_fixes.title: 1 broken links detected
environment_fixes.reason: Broken internal links hurt crawl flow and user trust.
environment_fixes.fix: Fix links in route components and content source files; validate with link checks in CI.

environment_fixes.title: Performance measurement incomplete
environment_fixes.reason: PageSpeed API returned an error, so CWV recommendations are less reliable.
environment_fixes.fix: Set `PAGESPEED_API_KEY` in your environment or `.env` file (see `.env.example`), then rerun. The CLI also accepts `--api-key`. Prioritize LCP/INP/CLS fixes from that output.

environment_fixes.title: Content readability is difficult
environment_fixes.reason: Long, complex text can reduce engagement and comprehension.
environment_fixes.fix: Rewrite key sections with shorter sentences (15-20 words), shorter paragraphs (2-4 sentences), and clearer subheadings.
